description:
Scattered hardcoded strings and repeated filter patterns in daemon code:

Actor strings (no constants):
- "ao-cli" appears 8x (ops_task_control, ops_git/worktree, ops_workflow)
- "ao-daemon" appears 3x (daemon_reconciliation, daemon_git_worktree)
- "ao-core" appears 2x (planning_impl)

Repeated filter patterns:
- WorkflowStatus::Running|Paused|Pending active_task_ids collection — 5 identical copies (daemon_reconciliation x3, daemon_task_lifecycle, daemon_task_dispatch)
- `if task.paused || task.cancelled { continue; }` — 4 identical copies
- `gh --version` availability check — 2 identical copies in daemon_git_merge.rs

Also:
- 3x parse_env_bool/parse_env_flag_enabled/env_bool_override — same truthy/falsy string parsing
- env_phase_key() extracted but not used by phase_model_id and phase_tool_id which inline the same logic

Solution: Define actor constants. Extract active_workflow_task_ids() helper. Extract ensure_gh_available(). Consolidate env-bool parsing into single pub function.
title: Centralize hardcoded actor strings and daemon filter patterns
